name: TSUKIGAKURE TOUKAI NO JUTSU (HIDDEN MOON CONCEALMENT TECHNIQUE)

description.value:
Type: Ninjutsu

Rank: 9 (Spell Level 5)

Chakra Cost: 7

Learn DC: 24 | Successes: 4

Perform: 12 | Perform DC: 26

Components: C, H

This technique originated in the Hidden Village of Steel, which was destroyed long ago. You cover yourself and your equipment in a cold, steel-like substance that provides protection and camouflage, without hindering your movement. You gain a +20 bonus to Hide checks while in complete darkness and a +4 bonus to Move Silently checks. The DC to track you increases by 5, and the 'mantle' removes your scent, making it impossible for creatures to detect or track you by scent.

When exposed to sunlight (or light of similar strength), every creature within 30 ft of you (including yourself) with a direct line of sight to you is @Condition[blind]{blinded} for 1d6 rounds (Fortitude DC 15 negates). In addition, you suffer a 25% miss chance, and creatures within 30 ft suffer a 25% miss chance when attacking you. Blind creatures are not blinded and do not suffer a miss chance.

Original author's note: This technique was directly taken from the fanfiction Foxhound, which I find extremely entertaining. Its name was changed from Kage Jutsu: Yabun no Fukemen, which I found inappropriate.
